case_title: REINA AGUILERA ORTIZ VS. EMPORIUM SFC GROUP, LLC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-26-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EMPORIUM SFC GROUP, LLC. DBA. ORO  GOLD COSMETICS
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT EMPORIUM SFC GROUP, LLC. DBA. ORO  GOLD COSMETICS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF AGUILERA ORTIZ, REINA AS TO DEFENDANT EMPORIUM SFC GROUP, LLC. DBA. ORO  GOLD COSMETICS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AGUILERA ORTIZ, REINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EMPORIUM SFC GROUP, LLC. DBA. ORO  GOLD COSMETICS $609.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $609.00, TO HONOR GUARANTEE WHEN PLAINTIFF TRIED TO RETURN PRODUCT, BASED ON PLAINTIFF'S TESTIMONY. DEFENDANT WAS NOT CREDIBLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED BY DEFENDANT EMPORIUM SFC GROUP, LLC. DBA. ORO  GOLD COSMETICS

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AGUILERA ORTIZ, REINA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID LAVINE. FILED BY AGUILERA ORTIZ, REINA EMPORIUM SFC GROUP, LLC. DBA. ORO  GOLD COSMETICS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,409.00 FILED BY AGUILERA ORTIZ, REINA AS TO DEFENDANT EMPORIUM SFC GROUP, LLC. DBA. ORO  GOLD COSMETICS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-23-2015 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-23-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-23-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY OMARI HANOVER--OWNER/MANAGER/OFFICER. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---EVELYN PRITCHARD. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-23-2015 - JUDGMENT.
